title: Convert JSON Array to YAML List
cap_description: Convert a JSON array to a YAML sequence
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a JSON array into a YAML sequence. Use this when downstream caps or configuration files expect YAML but the upstream produces a JSON array.

## Inputs

A JSON array.

## Outputs

A YAML sequence.

## Notes

- Semantically lossless for all JSON scalar types.
- For the reverse, use [Convert YAML List to JSON Array](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;textable").
